data.title: FRONTERA DETERMINES BINDING OFFER FROM PAREX RESOURCES INC. IS A SUPERIOR PROPOSAL TO PREVIOUSLY ANNOUNCED GEOPARK TRANSACTION
data.description: Calgary, Alberta - On March 5, 2026, Frontera Energy Corporation (TSX: FEC) revealed that the Frontera Board of Directors, alongside external legal counsel and independent financial advisors, has assessed and confirmed a binding offer. The offer's specific details were not disclosed, as the evaluation process is ongoing.

data.title: Former executive of blood filter start-up charged for concealing deaths. ExThera lured patients to Antigua; ex-chief regulatory officer could face three-year sentence.
data.description: ExThera lured cancer patients to Antigua by claiming its devices could provide a cure, resulting in legal issues. The company's ex-chief regulatory officer is now facing a possible sentence of up to three years in prison.
